mapper.select: select id,group_type as groupType,name,value,sort from dict where group_type = #{value}
select s_danmu.id,video_id as videoId,text,uid,time ,s_user.username from s_danmu left join s_user on s_user.id = s_danmu.uid where video_id = #{value}
select st.id, video_id, user_id, talk_content, publish_time, href_info, su.username, su.avatar as pic from s_talk st left join s_user su on su.id = st.user_id where video_id = #{videoId}

select sr.id, talk_id as talkId, user_id as userId, reply_content as replyContent, reply_time as replyTime, rname, reply_href as replyHref, su.username, su.avatar as pic from s_reply sr left join s_user su on su.id = sr.user_id where talk_id = #{talkId}

select sv.id, title, type, pic, base_path as basePath, uid,dict.name as languageName,su.username,su.avatar,status from s_video sv left join dict on sv.type = dict.value and dict.group_type = 'language_type' left join s_user su on su.id = sv.uid
and title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
mapper.update: update s_video set status = #{status} where id = #{videoId}
